key_finding: Selectivity-based protection FAILS to rescue AC/TC framework on Llama. Ranking: TC > H2O >> Random ≈ AC ≈ SEL. Position in causal chain is the dominant factor (H2O rho=-0.56 with position). Answer-coupled positions are NOT causally valid on Llama.
evidence_impact: Major revision: spatial structure claim narrowed to Qwen-specific. The hidden channel exists but is architecture-dependent. On Llama (distributed encoding), position dominates and TC outperforms AC for answer preservation.
next_planned: Position-controlled protection test (within-quartile) to isolate positional confound completely, OR test AC-protection on Qwen where PGD validates AC
also_completed: Analyzed exp_012 results from crashed cycle 12 (AC-protection fails on Llama, H2O outperforms). Updated evidence ledger with both exp_012 and exp_013 findings.

spatial_structure.status: Qwen-specific (PGD rho=0.78); NOT causally valid on Llama

natural_usage.status: negative — neither H2O nor AC capture hidden channel for Llama; TC is best but ironic

cross_model_replication.status: dissociation replicated; but spatial structure is architecture-specific
